description: Use battle ID for local hax folder names instead of target name
context:
Beads description:
Currently hax folders are created using the target name (e.g. ~/.synhax/my_target/). This causes conflicts when the same target is used in multiple battles. Change to use battle ID so each battle has its own isolated folder (e.g. ~/.synhax/battle-uuid/).
